title: alyssum bernhardii
intro: Alyssum bernhardii, also known as Maire's candytuft or Bernhard's candytuft, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. Alyssum bernhardii has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk remedies to treat a range of ailments, including coughs and colds.
